title: Cyclic Groups
description: Cyclic groups model repeated application of an operation from a generator and are the algebraic setting for many Bitcoin cryptographic constructions. They define why private scalars can map to public points in a structured way.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Deeper walk-through of the cryptography, scripting, and transaction mechanics behind this topic.

resources.title: BIP 340: Schnorr Signatures for secp256k1
resources.notes: Defines group operations and notation used for signatures.

resources.title: secp256k1 README
resources.notes: Implementation-oriented context for cyclic group operations on curve points.
